segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a sleek, tech-inspired title card reading 'The First Look 2024' against a dark circuit-board background, accompanied by upbeat, tech-inspired background music. A male voice then poses the question, 'What does TV mean to you?' The narrative unfolds with a woman in a floral top and striped shirt in a cozy diner, sharing a nostalgic memory of fighting over the remote with her sister, stating, 'Growing up, we used to fight over the remote, like always. We're still doing it.' Another male voice describes TV as 'kind of like a drinking buddy,' adding, 'Nothing beats a cold beer in front of the TV after work.' A woman with short gray hair and glasses, sipping tea in a modern living room, reflects on TV's evolving size, noting, 'When I was young, a 20-inch TV was something. These days, if it's not an 80-something inch model, no one really notices.' A young man in a gray sweatshirt, holding a controller in a dimly lit gaming room, speaks passionately about the immersive experience, declaring, 'I literally can't game without it. I swear once you try it, there’s no going back.' A man in a light gray shirt, with a distinct accent, expresses frustration about only being able to sit next to his partner during soccer matches, lamenting, 'She never hangs out with me anymore. The only time I can sit next to her is when there's a soccer match on.' A woman in a black-and-white houndstooth blazer admits, 'Honestly, I'm not much of a TV guy, but I just bought it because it looks cool.' In a bright, sunlit living room, a woman in a navy vest and white blouse sits with her golden retriever, calling the spot in front of the TV her 'favorite spot,' as 'it's what connects me to the world.' The segment closes in a modern kitchen where two women prepare food; one in a patterned blouse recalls, 'Back in my day, the TV was the center of the home, where we would all gather,' while the other, in a pink hoodie, agrees, noting, 'I mean, it's still the same. You can tell what's going on in a house through their TV.' The continuous upbeat music underscores these diverse personal reflections on TV’s evolving role.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with a sleek, tech-inspired title card reading 'The First Look 2024' against a dark circuit-board background, transitioning to a black screen with the question 'What does TV mean to you?' The narrative unfolds through a series of personal reflections from diverse individuals in various settings. A woman in a floral top and striped shirt shares a nostalgic memory of fighting over the remote with her sister in a cozy diner, while another woman with short gray hair and glasses, wearing a beige top and black necklace, reflects on TV as a centerpiece of her home, sipping tea in a modern living room. A young man in a gray sweatshirt, holding a controller, speaks passionately about the immersive experience of gaming, emphasizing that 'once you try it, there’s no going back.' A man in a light gray shirt expresses his frustration about only being able to sit next to his partner during soccer matches, while a woman in a black-and-white houndstooth blazer admits she bought her TV for its cool design. In a bright, sunlit living room, a woman in a navy vest and white blouse sits with her golden retriever, calling the spot in front of the TV her favorite, as it 'connects me to the world.' The segment closes with two women in a modern kitchen—one in a patterned blouse, the other in a pink hoodie—preparing food while discussing how the TV remains the center of family gatherings, with one noting you can tell what’s happening in a house by its TV. The scenes shift between intimate, warm interiors and casual, everyday moments, emphasizing TV’s evolving role in personal and social life.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in a modern, sunlit living room where an older man in a dark sweater and trousers, speaking in a deep, calm voice, remarks, "Well, we used to call it an idiot box." His companion, a younger man with curly dark hair in a gray jacket, responds in a slightly higher-pitched voice, "We call it a smart TV." A woman's upbeat voice adds, "I mean, it fits the style of my place," followed by another woman's enthusiastic voice stating, "Every weekend we binge-watch." The younger man then exclaims, "Mad engaging," as a close-up of him is shown, followed by a quick cut to a woman with long dark hair smiling warmly, with the text 'Mad engaging' overlay. A calm, reflective woman's voice declares, "TV is me time," as the scene transitions to a large, dark auditorium with a massive screen displaying a split image of the two men from the living room, accompanied by the text 'TV is me time.' An excited woman's voice adds, "I really love this," while the older man's deep voice concludes, "Always has been, always will." The screen then shows an older woman with short gray hair and glasses, with the text 'What's next?' as a curious woman's voice asks, "What's next?" The audience is visible in silhouette, capturing the moment on their devices. The screen then displays 'SAMSUNG presents' followed by 'The First Look 2024' in bold blue letters. An announcer's formal voice introduces, "Please give a warm welcome to the Corporate President of Samsung Electronics, S.W. Yong," as dynamic animation reveals his name. Upbeat electronic music swells with enthusiastic applause as SW Yong, dressed in a navy sweater and light gray trousers, walks onto the stage. He greets the audience with a clear, slightly accented, confident voice, "Hello everybody," and continues, "Welcome to First Look 2024. What a great pleasure and honor to be with you today." The screen behind him shifts to a futuristic blue design with 'The First Look 2024' and then to a series of glowing panels flanking the year '2024,' as he announces, "I am very excited. Today marks the day we reveal the vision behind our 2024 product lineup and unveil the innovative..." The atmosphere is professional and anticipatory, with focused lighting on the stage and audience engagement evident through phone usage.

The atmosphere is professional and anticipatory, with focused lighting on the stage and audience engagement evident through phone usage.

segments.integrated_caption: SW Yong, Corporate President of Samsung Electronics, walks onto a dimly lit stage under focused lighting, with a large screen behind him displaying '2024' flanked by glowing panels. He begins his presentation, speaking in a clear, slightly accented English voice about Samsung's dedication to creating and how technology has made huge progress since the pandemic. As he discusses the rise of generative AI and its role in redefining screens for enhanced connectivity, the screen dynamically transitions to 'Development of AI Technology' with abstract neural network visuals. He then emphasizes the importance of product safety, stating that all new Samsung products are 'safe and protected by Samsung Knox,' coinciding with a secure vault graphic on the screen. Throughout the years, he explains, Samsung has pursued innovative solutions to enhance quality of life, leading to their mission. The presentation culminates with a split-screen showcasing diverse home environments featuring large screens, as he declares the slogan, 'Screens everywhere, screens for all.' Simultaneously, the audience, visible as silent silhouettes, records the event on their phones, contributing to the high-tech atmosphere. He then transitions to discussing sustainable steps, such as using more recycled materials, as the screen displays split-screen visuals of recycled materials, energy-saving designs, and solar farms.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with SW Yong, identified as Corporate President of Samsung Electronics, walking onto a dimly lit stage under focused stage lighting, with a large presentation screen behind him displaying the year '2024' flanked by glowing, translucent panels. He begins his presentation, gesturing as he speaks about the company's mission to make technology more accessible and progressive. The screen transitions to a dynamic display titled 'Development of AI Technology,' featuring abstract visuals of neural networks and artistic imagery, as he discusses the rise of generative AI and its role in creativity and connectivity. The visuals shift to a secure vault graphic with the Samsung Knox logo, emphasizing product safety. He then highlights Samsung's commitment to sustainability, with split-screen visuals showing recycled materials, energy-saving designs, and solar farms, accompanied by text overlays. The presentation culminates with a split-screen showcasing diverse home environments—artistic, casual, and social—featuring large screens in various settings, underscoring the slogan 'Screens Everywhere, Screens for All.' The audience, visible as silhouettes, records the event on their phones, adding to the immersive, high-tech atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: On a dimly lit stage, SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses in a navy sweater, confidently delivers a presentation on Samsung's initiatives. He speaks with a clear, non-native English accent about 'using recycled materials,' 'reducing energy consumption,' and 'leveraging renewable solutions like solar power,' as the large screen behind him dynamically displays three panels with corresponding images of textured materials, a smartphone, and solar panels. He emphasizes that 'at every stage of our product's life,' they've made 'thoughtful improvements to minimize our impact,' even 'using less ink in our product packaging from start to finish,' which is visually reinforced by a transition to various Samsung product boxes, including a close-up of a QLED TV box with accessibility icons. Yong then shifts focus, stating, 'Our concern for the environment is also our concern for people,' and that Samsung is working on 'very innovative features' for those with 'different needs.' He highlights a 'sign language feature that can be easily controlled with gestures for the hearing impaired' and 'technology that turns subtitles into spoken words in real time for the visually impaired,' both demonstrated on a split screen. The presentation concludes with a hopeful message about making the future accessible, accompanied by a serene image of a lantern floating at dusk with the text 'Carrying the weight of all our wishes?'. Overhead spotlights illuminate the stage, accented by blue lighting, while the audience, visible as silhouettes, records the event on their phones.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment features SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, delivering a presentation on stage in a dark auditorium. He stands confidently, gesturing with his hands as he speaks about Samsung’s sustainability and accessibility initiatives. The large presentation screen behind him displays dynamic visuals: initially, three panels highlight 'Using recycled materials,' 'Reducing energy consumption,' and 'Leveraging renewable solutions,' with corresponding images of textured materials, a smartphone, and solar panels. The screen then transitions to show various Samsung product boxes, emphasizing eco-friendly packaging, followed by a close-up of a QLED TV box with accessibility icons. The presentation shifts focus to innovative features, with a split-screen showing 'Gesture Recognition' for the hearing impaired and a visual representation of subtitles being converted into spoken words, accompanied by a serene image of a lantern floating at dusk with the text 'Carrying the weight of all our wishes?'. The stage is illuminated by overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting, while the audience, visible as silhouettes, records the event on their phones. The narrative flows from environmental responsibility to inclusive technology, culminating in a hopeful message about making the future accessible for everyone.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing center stage under focused lighting. He gestures expressively as he speaks in clear, accented English, concluding a thought about making "a future brighter for everyone." Behind him, a large presentation screen displays a serene image of a lantern at dusk with the text 'Carrying the weight of all our wishes?' and a subtitle 'to make the future brighter for everyone.' The audience, silhouetted in the dark auditorium, watches attentively, some recording with their phones. A subtle, futuristic background music plays throughout. The screen transitions to a dark background with glowing outlines of various smart devices as SW Yong introduces the "super-connected era," stating that screens should be "key enablers to enhance our lives on and off screen." He continues, emphasizing Samsung's continuous effort to "look out of the box to inspire new ways of life," a principle "embedded within Samsung's DNA." The screen now shows multiple lifestyle images: a family in a living room, a woman interacting with a smart display, and a person working on a digital art project. SW Yong explains their goal to give everyone what they're looking for, whether it's a "close-knit family bonding over a favorite show," a "person relaxing in front of the screen after a busy working day," or "someone who wants to make their life smarter and easier." The visuals shift to show a family watching a movie, a man relaxing on a sofa with a scenic view on his screen, and a woman creating digital art, illustrating diverse user experiences. The presentation culminates with a dynamic, abstract visual of a screen with light streaks, as the text 'A new era of AI screens' appears, signaling that "Samsung screens will surpass traditional smart TVs and usher in..." a new era, with blue and white lighting enhancing the high-tech atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing center stage in a dark auditorium. He gestures confidently as he introduces 'A new era of AI screens,' a phrase he articulates with a clear, confident male voice, against a large presentation screen displaying abstract, light-streaked visuals. The screen transitions to a view of Earth from space with the text 'Global No. 1 TV,' as SW Yong speaks about Samsung’s 18-year leadership in TV manufacturing and its commitment to enhancing lifestyles. The backdrop shifts to a blue circuit-board design with 'AI screens' highlighted, followed by a breakdown of 'On-device AI technology' with benefits like 'Fast data processing,' 'High level of privacy protection,' and 'Reduced power consumption' appearing sequentially, which SW Yong explains are key features. The stage then displays multiple vertical screens showing lifestyle scenes—art, family, and smart home interfaces—under the banner 'A more flexible and diverse lifestyle,' as he emphasizes seamless on- and off-screen experiences as the centerpiece of an AI home. The segment concludes with SW Yong introducing the 'Neo QLED 8K' and 'QN900D' models, with the screen transitioning to a vibrant, abstract light display. Throughout, the audience in the auditorium is visible as silhouettes, many holding up phones to record, under focused stage lighting with blue accents along the stage edge.

segments.integrated_caption: The minute opens with an intense, futuristic electronic score, punctuated by digital sound effects like whooshes and mechanical whirs, as a simulated NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor, glowing with circuits, descends into a complex digital landscape. The text 'NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor' and 'Everything transforms' appear, setting a tone of technological evolution. Abstract hexagonal patterns break apart, followed by close-ups of sleek metallic surfaces with ventilation holes and circular dials, hinting at high-end hardware. A serene, reflective landscape with a purple-hued sky emerges, overlaid with 'Neo QLED 8K' as a transparent screen materializes. The scene then shifts to a dark auditorium, where an audience, many recording on their phones, applauds enthusiastically. On stage, SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater and light gray trousers, gestures confidently. He asks the audience, with a clear, confident male voice, "Doesn't it look great?", to which they respond with a collective "Yes." Behind him, a large presentation screen cycles through vibrant visuals, including a colorful cityscape, a mountain reflection, a golden cathedral ceiling, and a whale breaching the ocean. SW Yong explains that the display is powered by "the powerful next-gen AI processor," which he describes as "the pinnacle of Samsung's technological expertise." He further highlights the "sleek Infinity Air Design" of the Neo QLED 8K TV, stating it "makes the TV appear as if floating on air," promising a "truly immersive" experience "no matter what you are watching." He concludes by saying, "And that's just..." as the segment ends.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with a futuristic, simulated animation of a glowing processor descending into a complex digital landscape, with the text 'NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor' appearing prominently. Bright light streaks radiate outward as the phrase 'Everything transforms' emerges, setting a tone of technological evolution. The scene transitions to abstract hexagonal patterns breaking apart, followed by close-ups of sleek, metallic surfaces with ventilation holes and circular dials, hinting at high-end hardware design. A serene, reflective landscape with a purple-hued sky is shown, overlaid with the text 'Neo QLED 8K' as a transparent screen materializes. The setting shifts to a live presentation in a dark auditorium, where a large screen displays vibrant visuals of a colorful cityscape and a mountain reflection. The speaker, SW Yong, stands on stage in a navy sweater and light gray trousers, gesturing as he introduces the 'Powerful next gen AI processor' and the 'Infinity Air Design' that makes the TV appear to float. The screen behind him cycles through dynamic images, including a golden cathedral ceiling and a whale breaching the ocean, emphasizing the display’s clarity and immersive design. The presentation concludes with SW Yong stating, 'And that’s just the beginning of what makes the QN900D so special,' as the audience remains engaged, many recording the event on their phones.

audio_updated_entities.Neo QLED 8K TV: A sleek, ultra-thin television with a nearly bezel-less design, showcased on stage and in simulated environments, featuring the 'Infinity Air Design' that SW Yong explains 'makes the TV appear as if floating on air,' promising a 'truly immersive' viewing experience, and displaying vivid, high-resolution images of landscapes and architecture.
audio_updated_entities.NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor: A simulated, futuristic processor chip labeled 'SAMSUNG NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor', shown in a digital environment with glowing circuits and data streams. SW Yong refers to it as 'the powerful next-gen AI processor' and 'the pinnacle of Samsung's technological expertise'.
audio_updated_entities.Infinity Air Design: A design feature of the Neo QLED 8K TV, highlighted on screen with visuals of the TV appearing to float above a reflective surface. SW Yong describes this design as 'sleek' and explains it 'makes the TV appear as if floating on air'.

segments.integrated_caption: The video segment opens with SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing center stage in front of a massive presentation screen. He begins speaking clearly and articulately, introducing the "beginning of what makes the QN900D so special." The screen initially displays a serene image of a whale breaching the ocean at sunset, with the text 'Infinity Air Design' overlaid. As SW Yong continues, stating, "First, the QN900D is the heart of your home," the screen transitions to bold white text reading 'Hub of your AI Home.' He gestures expressively, explaining how the TV connects different devices to make living spaces more comfortable, acting as "the hub of your AI home, linking all your home appliances seamlessly and monitoring them real-time to help you optimize power usage." The screen then shifts to a dynamic line-drawing animation of a home layout, illustrating how the TV acts as a central hub, linking appliances like refrigerators, ovens, and speakers via glowing dotted lines. SW Yong elaborates on security, mentioning how "your home will be more secure" and how the screen gathers information from sensors and appliances to send "emergency notifications." The animation highlights these security features, showing emergency alerts with a red warning symbol on a refrigerator and a washing machine. A pop-up notification then appears on screen: 'BESPOKE Cube Air is now ready to use in SmartThings,' demonstrating how the TV can manage smart devices without unnecessary distractions, as he states, "you'll never miss a chore or get distracted by unnecessary alarms." The segment concludes with a transition to a new title, 'Second, the QN900D is a personalized AI screen,' as SW Yong continues his presentation. The audience, silhouetted in the dark auditorium, watches attentively, many holding up phones to record the event, illuminated by overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting along the stage's front edge, creating a modern, high-tech atmosphere.

audio_updated_entities.SW Yong: A man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing on stage and gesturing as he presents Samsung’s vision for AI screens and connected living, speaking clearly and articulately about the QN900D's features and capabilities.

segments.integrated_caption: On a dimly lit stage, SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses in a navy sweater, confidently presents, his voice clear and slightly accented, introducing the 'Personalized AI screen' feature of the QN900D. As he gestures expressively, the large presentation screen behind him dynamically displays text and visuals, emphasizing its ability to tailor experiences to user preferences. He explains that for gamers, the AI engine instantly recognizes the game and optimizes picture and sound quality with 'AI auto game mode,' which is visually represented by a gaming interface with adjustable audio and video settings, highlighting 'Automatic optimization for peak performance' and 'Hassle-free gaming experience.' The presentation then transitions to showcase the Samsung Tizen OS and the NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor, as SW Yong describes how they work together to deliver personalized content and service recommendations, with visuals focusing on streaming services like Netflix, Apple TV+, and Prime Video. He elaborates on how 'these interconnecting experiences allow seamless connection' across all personal devices, from mobile phones to earbuds and smartwatches, aligning with a diagram of interconnected devices on screen. The audience, silhouetted in the foreground, remains visibly engaged, many recording the event with their phones under the glow of overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting. The segment culminates with a display of the Neo QLED 8K TV’s interface, which SW Yong declares 'is going to unlock endless possibilities for you,' positioning it as a central hub for entertainment and connected living.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment features SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, presenting on a dimly lit stage in front of a large presentation screen. He gestures expressively as he introduces the 'Personalized AI screen' feature of the QN900D, emphasizing its ability to tailor experiences to user preferences. The screen behind him dynamically displays text and visuals, including a gaming interface with adjustable audio and video settings, highlighting 'Automatic optimization for peak performance' and 'Hassle-free gaming experience' with AI auto game mode. The presentation transitions to showcase the Samsung Tizen OS and the NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor, illustrating how they work together to deliver personalized content and service recommendations, with a focus on streaming services like Netflix, Apple TV+, and Prime Video. The visuals then shift to a diagram of interconnected devices, including mobile phones, earbuds, and smartwatches, emphasizing seamless device integration. The audience, silhouetted in the foreground, is visibly engaged, with many holding up phones to record the event. The stage is illuminated by overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting, creating a modern, tech-focused atmosphere. The presentation culminates with a display of the Neo QLED 8K TV’s interface, showcasing its role as a hub for entertainment and connected living, with the tagline 'This is going to unlock endless possibilities for you.'

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing center stage in front of a massive presentation screen. The auditorium is dimly lit, with silhouetted audience members visible in the foreground, many holding up phones to record. The stage is illuminated by overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting. SW Yong, speaking in a clear male voice, begins by stating the goal to "create a new and freer style." The presentation screen dynamically displays the Samsung Tizen OS interface, showcasing content like 'Conan O'Brien TV' and 'Sonic the Hedgehog.' He then announces, "Finally, the QN900D comes with a powerful AI processor, called NQ8 AI Gen3," as the screen transitions to bold white text: 'Powerful AI processor,' followed by a detailed, futuristic reveal of the 'NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor.' Gesturing, SW Yong explains that this processor "takes everyday moments to the next level, making everything more impressive," by using "advanced deep learning technology with an amazing 512 neural networks," which is "eight times more than before." He further details that the NPU is "twice as fast as the previous version, making the screen's picture and sound quality better than ever." The screen highlights features like 'AI Upscaling' and 'AI Motion Enhancer,' demonstrating how "even low-quality content can be upscaled up to 8K quality." Next, 'Active Voice Amplifier Pro' is introduced on a split-screen showing a man and woman in a restaurant, as SW Yong explains it "uses AI to analyze sound and background noise," illustrating how the AI isolates dialogue from ambient sound and background music. Throughout, the visuals shift from abstract tech diagrams to real-life scenarios, maintaining a sleek, high-tech atmosphere with dynamic transitions and clear, bold on-screen text.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment opens with SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing center stage in front of a massive presentation screen. The auditorium is dimly lit, with silhouetted audience members visible in the foreground, many holding up phones to record. The stage is illuminated by overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting along the front edge. The presentation begins with a dynamic display of the Samsung Tizen OS interface, showcasing content like 'Conan O'Brien TV' and 'Sonic the Hedgehog,' emphasizing a new and freer lifestyle. The screen then transitions to a bold white text: 'Powerful AI processor,' followed by a detailed reveal of the 'NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor' with a futuristic, circuit-like visual design. SW Yong gestures as he explains the processor’s capabilities, including its 512 neural networks—eight times more than the previous generation—and a 2x faster NPU, enhancing picture and sound quality. The screen then highlights features like 'AI Upscaling' and 'AI Motion Enhancer,' demonstrating how low-quality content can be upscaled to 8K. Next, 'Active Voice Amplifier Pro' is introduced, with a split-screen showing a man and woman in a restaurant, illustrating how the AI isolates dialogue from ambient sound and background music. Throughout, the visuals shift from abstract tech diagrams to real-life scenarios, maintaining a sleek, high-tech atmosphere with dynamic transitions and clear, bold on-screen text.

segments.integrated_caption: SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, stands on a dimly lit stage under overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting. He speaks with a clear, articulate voice, explaining Samsung's vision to "optimize your TV listening experience." Behind him, a massive presentation screen initially displays a restaurant scene with text labels like 'Ambient sound,' 'Dialogue,' 'Noise,' and 'BGM,' highlighting the 'Active Voice Amplifier Pro' feature. As he continues, stating, "This means you can enjoy everything from live sports to K-pop concerts and even OTT content, originally created in lower resolution like Full HD," the screen transitions to a football game. Text overlays such as 'More detailed' and 'and realistic' appear, emphasizing the TV's ability to upscale lower-resolution content to near 8K quality, creating an immersive experience "as if you're in the front row of a stadium or movie theater." He declares, "You are now entering a whole new era of amazing 8K reality." The scene then shifts to a futuristic diagram labeled 'Samsung Gauss,' a generative AI technology, as SW Yong announces, "Moving forward, Samsung screens will incorporate generative AI technology called Samsung Gauss, which we recently introduced at the Samsung Developers Conference." He gestures expressively, explaining, "With Samsung Gauss in our TVs, we foresee a future where news anchors or movie dialogues are instantly translated, seamlessly crossing the boundaries of the screen." The screen illustrates this with a news anchor and 'Instantly translated subtitles' in Korean. The final visual shows a user interface of Samsung Tizen OS with a 'Cloud update' icon, reinforcing his statement that "Samsung screen will continue to upscale your everyday experience." Throughout, the audience is silhouetted in the foreground, many recording the event on their phones.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment opens with SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing on a dimly lit stage in front of a massive presentation screen. The screen initially displays a restaurant scene with text labels like 'Ambient sound,' 'Dialogue,' 'Noise,' and 'BGM,' highlighting the 'Active Voice Amplifier Pro' feature. As SW Yong speaks, the screen transitions to a football game, with text overlays such as 'More detailed' and 'and realistic,' emphasizing the TV's ability to upscale lower-resolution content to near 8K quality, creating an immersive experience 'as if you're in the front row of a stadium or movie theatre.' The scene then shifts to a futuristic diagram labeled 'Samsung Gauss,' a generative AI technology introduced at the Samsung Developers Conference, with icons representing various AI functions. SW Yong gestures expressively as he explains the technology, and the screen transitions to a news anchor with Korean subtitles appearing under the text 'Instantly translated subtitles,' illustrating real-time translation capabilities. The final scene shows a user interface of Samsung Tizen OS with a 'Cloud update' icon, reinforcing the idea of continuous enhancement of the viewing experience. Throughout, the stage is illuminated by overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting, with the audience silhouetted in the foreground, many recording the event on their phones.

segments.integrated_caption: SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater, stands center stage in a dark auditorium, speaking calmly about Samsung's 'Cloud update' for Tizen OS, which provides frequent online updates directly to TVs. Behind him, a large presentation screen displays the Tizen OS interface and a cloud icon. The audience, visible as silhouettes, records the event with their phones. SW Yong then declares the 'AI screen journey' is just beginning, as the screen transitions to a panoramic mountain landscape with the text 'AI screen journey'. He invites the audience to an exhibition space to experience the 'stunning visuals', 'immersive sound', and 'magic' of Samsung's screens. The presentation continues with SW Yong introducing the 'full lineup of our ultra-large micro LED screens', while the screen displays 'MICRO LED' with a desert scene. He then highlights the 'Neo QLED 8K' and its 'amazing capabilities powered by our new AI processor', as the screen shows a sunrise over clouds labeled 'Neo QLED 8K'. Finally, he encourages the audience not to miss their 'new lifestyle screens that add a beautiful aesthetic to your space', coinciding with 'The Frame' displaying a floral painting. The segment concludes with a bold 'The First Look 2024' title on the screen, as SW Yong gestures, encouraging viewers to see how Samsung screens can transform their daily routine in new ways, all under consistent professional stage lighting.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment opens with SW Yong, a man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing center stage in a dark auditorium. He gestures calmly as he speaks, introducing the 'Cloud update' for Samsung Tizen OS, with a large presentation screen behind him displaying a user interface for streaming content, including 'Alone by HISTORY' and other shows. The screen also features the Samsung Tizen OS logo and a cloud icon. The audience, visible as silhouettes in the foreground, holds up phones to record. The scene transitions to a panoramic mountain landscape on the screen, with the text 'AI screen journey' appearing. SW Yong continues to speak, inviting the audience to an exhibition space to experience the 'stunning visuals' and 'magic' of Samsung's screens. The screen then displays three distinct product visuals: 'MICRO LED' with a desert scene, 'Neo QLED 8K' with a sunrise over clouds, and 'The Frame' with a floral painting, each labeled clearly. SW Yong emphasizes the capabilities of the Neo QLED 8K powered by the new AI Processor and how these screens enhance daily life. The segment concludes with a bold title 'The First Look 2024' on the screen, as SW Yong gestures toward the audience, encouraging them to see how Samsung screens can transform their space. The stage lighting remains consistent with overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting along the front edge, maintaining a professional and modern atmosphere throughout.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a wide shot of a dark auditorium, where SW Yong, dressed in a navy sweater and glasses, stands center stage in front of a massive presentation screen displaying 'The First Look 2024'. He concludes his speech in a clear, articulate voice, stating, "is how Samsung screens can transform your space into a place of wonder and excitement. Thank you." As he finishes, the audience, visible as silhouettes in the foreground, erupts in applause. SW Yong clasps his hands together, smiles slightly, and begins to walk off stage to the right, passing in front of the still-illuminated screen. Upbeat electronic background music starts playing as he exits. The stage is illuminated by overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting, creating a sleek, professional atmosphere. The scene then fades to black, and the white 'SAMSUNG' logo appears centered on the screen, marking the end of the presentation.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment opens with a wide shot of a dark auditorium, where SW Yong stands center stage in front of a massive presentation screen displaying 'The First Look 2024' in bold white text against a gradient blue and purple background. He is dressed in a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, wearing glasses, and gestures with his hands as he speaks. The subtitles reveal his closing remarks: 'into a place of wonder and excitement. Thank you.' He then clasps his hands together, smiles slightly, and begins to walk off stage to the right, passing in front of the screen. The audience, visible as silhouettes in the foreground, remains seated, some holding up phones to record. As he exits, the screen remains illuminated with the 'The First Look 2024' title. The scene fades to black, and the white 'SAMSUNG' logo appears centered on the screen, marking the end of the presentation. The stage lighting consists of overhead spotlights and blue accent lighting along the front edge, contributing to a sleek, professional atmosphere.

entity_library.Woman in floral top and striped shirt: A woman with long brown hair, wearing a floral top and striped shirt, sharing a nostalgic memory in a cozy diner setting about fighting over the TV remote with her sister, stating, 'Growing up, we used to fight over the remote, like always. We're still doing it.'
entity_library.Woman with short gray hair and glasses: An older woman with short gray hair, wearing glasses, a beige top, and a black beaded necklace, shown in a close-up on a large screen in a dark auditorium, asking 'What's next?' in a curious voice.
entity_library.Young man in gray sweatshirt: A young man with short black hair, wearing a gray sweatshirt, holding a gaming controller in a dimly lit room with colorful ambient lighting, passionately stating he 'can't game without it' and that 'once you try it, there’s no going back'.
entity_library.Man in light gray shirt: A man with short dark hair, wearing a light gray button-up shirt, sitting on a couch with a woman beside him, expressing frustration with a distinct accent that his partner 'never hangs out with me anymore' except 'when there's a soccer match on'.
entity_library.Woman in black-and-white houndstooth bla: A woman with long black hair, wearing a black-and-white houndstooth blazer, standing in a bright room with large windows, admitting she's 'not much of a TV guy' but bought her TV 'because it looks cool'.
entity_library.Woman in navy vest and white blouse: A woman with long brown hair, wearing a navy vest over a white blouse, sitting on a stool in a sunlit living room with her golden retriever, calling the spot in front of the TV her 'favorite spot' because 'it's what connects me to the world'.
entity_library.Woman in patterned blouse: A woman with curly dark hair, wearing a blouse with a nature-themed print, standing in a modern kitchen, reflecting that 'back in my day, the TV was the center of the home, where we would all gather'.
entity_library.Woman in pink hoodie: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink hoodie with 'LADYBUG' printed on it, standing in a modern kitchen preparing food, agreeing that the TV is still central, noting 'you can tell what's going on in a house through their TV'.
entity_library.Golden retriever: A light golden-colored dog, sitting beside the woman in the navy vest in a bright living room, appearing calm and attentive.
entity_library.Diner setting: A cozy diner with warm lighting, red cups on shelves, and a menu board in the background, where the woman in the floral top shares her memory.
entity_library.Modern living room (dimly lit): A contemporary living room with a large TV, soft lighting, and a textured sofa, where the woman with gray hair reflects on TV’s role.
entity_library.Gaming room (dimly lit with colorful lig: A room with ambient blue and red lighting, a gaming setup, and a young man holding a controller, emphasizing the immersive experience of gaming.
entity_library.Bright living room with large windows: A sunlit, airy living room with white furniture, a fireplace, and large windows, where the woman in the navy vest sits with her dog.
entity_library.Modern kitchen: A bright, minimalist kitchen with white cabinetry, a large window, and a countertop with food and plants, where two women prepare a meal while discussing TV.
entity_library.Man in dark sweater and trousers: An older man with short gray hair, wearing a dark sweater and dark trousers, seated on a white sofa in a bright living room, speaking in a deep, calm voice about television, stating 'we used to call it an idiot box' and later, 'Always has been, always will.'
entity_library.Young man in gray jacket: A younger man with curly dark hair, wearing a gray jacket over a t-shirt, seated beside the older man on the sofa, listening and reacting, speaking in a slightly higher-pitched voice about calling it a 'smart TV' and finding it 'Mad engaging'.
entity_library.Woman with long dark hair: A woman with long dark hair, wearing a dark top, smiling warmly in a close-up shot, with the text 'Mad engaging' displayed.
entity_library.SW Yong: A man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a navy sweater over a collared shirt and light gray trousers, standing on stage and delivering a closing speech in a clear, articulate voice, stating 'is how Samsung screens can transform your space into a place of wonder and excitement. Thank you.' before walking off to the right.
entity_library.Audience in auditorium: Silhouetted figures in a dark auditorium, seated and holding up phones to record the event, who erupt in applause after SW Yong finishes his speech.
entity_library.Large presentation screen: A massive, high-resolution screen dominating the stage, displaying dynamic visuals including text like 'Cloud update', 'Samsung Tizen OS', 'AI screen journey', 'MICRO LED', 'Neo QLED 8K', 'The Frame', and 'The First Look 2024', along with scenic images of mountains, deserts, sunrises, and artwork, all directly referenced and introduced by SW Yong's speech.
entity_library.Stage lighting: Overhead spotlights casting focused beams on the stage, with blue accent lighting along the front edge, creating a modern and professional ambiance for the presentation.
entity_library.Neo QLED 8K TV: A sleek, ultra-thin television with a nearly bezel-less design, showcased on stage and in simulated environments, featuring the 'Infinity Air Design' that makes it appear to float, displaying vivid, high-resolution images, and described by SW Yong as having 'amazing capabilities powered by our new AI processor'.
entity_library.NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor: A simulated, futuristic processor chip labeled 'SAMSUNG NQ8 AI Gen3 Processor', shown in a digital environment with glowing circuits and data streams, described by SW Yong as integral to the AI capabilities for personalized experiences and gaming optimization.
entity_library.Infinity Air Design: A design feature of the Neo QLED 8K TV, highlighted on screen with visuals of the TV appearing to float above a reflective surface. SW Yong describes this design as 'sleek' and explains it 'makes the TV appear as if floating on air'.
entity_library.MICRO LED: A large screen display showing a desert landscape with a Joshua tree at sunset, labeled 'MICRO LED', emphasizing its high-definition and immersive visual quality, and introduced by SW Yong as part of the 'full lineup of our ultra-large micro LED screens'.
entity_library.The Frame: A television designed to look like a piece of art, displayed with a floral painting, labeled 'The Frame', highlighting its ability to blend into home decor, and referred to by SW Yong as one of the 'new lifestyle screens that add a beautiful aesthetic to your space'.
